steps.expected: Page loads with stat cards, DataTable, and Create ticket button
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with stat cards (Total: 2, Open: 2, In Progress: 0, Resolved: 0), DataTable with 2 ticket rows, and 'Create ticket' button visible

steps.action: Verify API response via curl GET /api/v1/portal/support/tickets
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/portal/support/tickets returned 200 with { success: true, data: { tickets: [...] } } containing 2 tickets

steps.expected: Modal opens with Subject, Category, Priority, Description fields
steps.observed: Modal opened with Subject textbox, Category combobox (Support/Bug Report/Feature Request), Priority combobox (Low/Medium/High/Critical), Description textarea, Cancel and Create ticket buttons

steps.action: Set Category to BUG via JS eval (native click timed out on option element)
steps.observed: Category set to BUG via programmatic select value change

steps.expected: POST /portal/support/tickets returns 200/201, toast confirms, ticket appears in list
steps.observed: Modal closed, stat cards updated to Total: 3 / Open: 3, new ticket 'E2E Test Ticket 1774937465' appeared as first row in DataTable with Bug Report category and Open status

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/portal/support/tickets -> success (ticket appeared in list, stat cards incremented)

steps.action: Click on ticket row (E2E Test Ticket 1774937465)
steps.expected: Drawer opens with subject, publicId, status badge, category, description, dates
steps.observed: Drawer/dialog opened showing: heading 'E2E Test Ticket 1774937465', paragraph 'Ticket #7162ec71-6e42-42d9-ad82-58e757c98501', status badge 'Open', category 'Bug Report', description text, Created date 'Today, 11:42 am', Company 'MOCK', Requester email, Updated date

steps.expected: Subject, publicId, status badge, category, description, dates all visible
steps.observed: All required fields present: subject (heading), publicId (#7162ec71-...), status badge (Open), category (Bug Report), description (full text), created/updated dates, company, requester

steps.action: Open create ticket dialog and submit with empty fields
steps.expected: Validation errors appear for subject and description, no POST fired
steps.observed: Validation errors displayed: 'Subject is required' and 'Description is required'. No POST request captured.

steps.action: Fill subject with 'ab' (2 chars) and description with 'ab' (2 chars), then submit
steps.observed: Validation errors: 'Subject must be at least 3 characters' and 'Description must be at least 10 characters'. No POST request fired.

steps.action: Verify no POST requests were made during validation testing
steps.observed: Network request log shows no captured requests to support endpoints

evidence.network: No POST requests fired (verified via network request log)

frictions.description: Native click on combobox/option elements timed out when trying to select 'Bug Report' category. The combobox uses a custom select component that doesn't respond to native Playwright click events on option elements.
frictions.resolution: Used JS eval to programmatically set the select value via HTMLSelectElement.prototype.value setter and dispatched 'change' event. This worked reliably.

frictions.description: Network request tracking was not available when browser session started before navigation. The agent-browser network tracking only captures requests made after the route is set up.
frictions.resolution: Used direct curl API calls to verify backend responses, and verified frontend behavior through page state changes (stat cards, table rows) instead of network interception.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-SUPPORT-001 (list loads) confirmed with API returning 200 and stat cards/DataTable rendering. VAL-SUPPORT-002 (create ticket) confirmed with ticket created, stat cards updated, and new ticket appearing in list. VAL-SUPPORT-003 (detail drawer) confirmed with all fields visible and close button working. VAL-SUPPORT-004 (form validation) confirmed with required field errors, min-length errors, and no POST fired on invalid submissions.
